items.title: 60-minute coding mock — phase timeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR C["Clarify
(3–5 min)"] --> A["Approach + tradeoffs
(5–10 min)"] A --> Co["Code
(25–35 min)"] Co --> W["Walk-through + edge cases
(5–10 min)"] W --> Big["Complexity + extensions
(3–5 min)"] Big --> F["Debrief
(5–10 min)"]
items.caption: A budgeted timeline keeps you from spending 45 minutes exploring and 15 minutes coding.

items.title: Feedback → reps loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  M["Do a mock"] --> R["Record observations"]
  R --> T["Identify TOP weakness"]
  T --> D["Targeted drill (10–20 min/day)"]
  D --> M
items.caption: Mocks are diagnostic; the real improvement happens in the targeted drill that follows.
